title: OpenAI once again makes the case for giving ChatGPT your health records - Engadget
summary: From there, OpenAI suggests you can revisit the Health tab to browse your records, view recent health trends and see suggested prompts to ask ChatGPT, but the main thrust of ChatGPT Health happens anytime your health is relevant to a chat.
